'''Lord Vartonis''' was a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] operating on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He had hoped to capture a mysterious crystal left on the planet by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] thousands of years ago, but an anonymous spacer, with the help of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] [[Force ghost/Legends|Force ghost]], was able to [[Mission on Mustafar|defeat]] him, and destroy the powerful crystal.

==Behind the scenes==
Vartonis appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

It was possible to attempt to take the crystal for yourself in-game, but Obi-Wan's Force ghost prevented you, draining the crystal of its power and giving you the drained form, which increased your in-game stats when used. The canonical version gave players a similar item.

After killing Vartonis, players could loot his corpse for a deed to a special in-game vehicle known as the [[Lava skiff/Legends|Lava Skiff]]. It allowed you to drive over the lava on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] without being burnt.

His species has not been officially confirmed yet, though it can be assumed that he is either of [[Sanyassan/Legends|Sanyassan]] or [[Sayormi]] origin.

==Appearances==
